user.title: Set up Climate Proxy
user.description: Create a virtual climate device that wraps a real thermostat. Climate Proxy will enforce your settings and optionally use external sensors for temperature and humidity readings.

data_description.proxy_name: Friendly name for this proxy device
data_description.climate_entity_id: The real thermostat or climate entity to wrap

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Climate Proxy
reconfigure.description: Change the underlying climate entity or rename this proxy device.

data_description.proxy_name: Friendly name for this proxy device
data_description.climate_entity_id: The real thermostat or climate entity to wrap

temp_sensors.title: Temperature Sensors (optional)
temp_sensors.description: Select one or more temperature sensors to use as the reference temperature. Leave empty to use the thermostat's built-in sensor.

temp_weights.title: Temperature Sensor Weights
temp_weights.description: Assign a relative weight to each selected temperature sensor. Higher weight means greater influence on the average.

humidity_sensors.title: Humidity Sensors (optional)
humidity_sensors.description: Select one or more humidity sensors to use as the reference humidity. Leave empty to use the thermostat's built-in sensor.

humidity_weights.title: Humidity Sensor Weights
humidity_weights.description: Assign a relative weight to each selected humidity sensor.

error.entity_not_found: The selected climate entity does not exist. Please check your selection.
error.entity_not_climate: The selected entity is not a climate entity. Please select a real thermostat.
error.entity_is_proxy: The selected entity is itself a Climate Proxy. Chaining proxies is not supported.

abort.already_configured: A proxy for this climate entity is already configured.

temp_sensors.title: Temperature Sensors
temp_sensors.description: Update the temperature sensors used as the reference reading.

temp_weights.title: Temperature Sensor Weights
temp_weights.description: Update the relative weight for each temperature sensor.

humidity_sensors.title: Humidity Sensors
humidity_sensors.description: Update the humidity sensors used as the reference reading.

humidity_weights.title: Humidity Sensor Weights
humidity_weights.description: Update the relative weight for each humidity sensor.

init.title: Acknowledge Configuration Issue
init.description:
Some configuration options are missing or invalid. Please reconfigure the integration to ensure proper operation.

Click Submit to acknowledge this issue.
